title: verbascum paui
intro: Verbascum paui, also known as mullein, is a biennial plant with large, velvety leaves and tall spikes of yellow flowers. Traditionally, mullein has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of mullein include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce inflammation, and promote relaxation, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Mullein can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal benefits.
